intake.event_framing: Assess market scenarios after an unexpected emergency rate hike.
intake.current_development: An emergency rate hike shocks funding markets, credit spreads, and rate expectations.
known_unknowns: Whether dealers can absorb the repositioning cleanly

summary: Authorities will prioritize market functioning if stress worsens

documents.rate-shock.md: The emergency rate hike triggers repricing across bonds and equities while liquidity stress rises.
documents.funding-stress.md: Funding markets widen immediately and investors debate whether policy credibility has improved or deteriorated.
